title: About
content: I'm Jason Murray, a backend engineer in Seattle working mostly in Go. This blog is where I write down what I learn at work and in my homelab so I don't have to relearn it later.

title: Now
content: Right now I'm heads-down on Ridgeline's offline sync, prepping for an on-call rotation later this month, and slowly tidying my homelab Kubernetes setup. Updated October 2026.

title: Projects
content: Ridgeline is my self-hosted read-it-later tool at ridgelinesystems.com. Glanceboard is a small homelab uptime dashboard at glanceboard.app. Both are open and built in Go on my home cluster.

title: Contact
content: Best way to reach me is email at jason.murray.dev@outlook.com, or find me as @jmurray_dev on X and jmurray-dev on GitHub. I read everything, replies can be slow.

title: Uses
content: The gear and software behind the blog: a MacBook Air M3, a custom keyboard, Go and Postgres, k3s at home, and Caddy out front. A sub-page of About for the curious.

title: Subscribe
content: Want new posts in your inbox? There's a short monthly email with whatever I wrote about Go, Postgres, and the homelab. No tracking, unsubscribe anytime.

title: RSS
content: Everything here is in the feed at /feed. I read blogs in NetNewsWire and assume you might too, so the full post body is included, not just an excerpt.

title: Colophon
content: This site is a static build deployed to my home cluster behind Caddy. Type is set in iA Writer Mono and a system serif. No analytics, no cookies, no JavaScript framework.

title: Privacy
content: I don't run analytics or ads and I don't set cookies. The only data I collect is your email if you choose to subscribe, and that lives in a Postgres table I control.

title: Archive
content: Every post, grouped by year. Handy when you want to scroll the whole back catalog instead of hopping through tags.

title: Tags
content: Browse posts by tag. Most of it clusters around Go, Postgres, Kubernetes, and the homelab, with the odd career note mixed in.

title: Talks
content: Slides and notes from the couple of lightning talks I've given at the Seattle Go meetup. Mostly about testing against real Postgres in CI.

title: Reading List
content: Papers, books, and talks on distributed systems and databases that I keep recommending. Updated as I get through the backlog.

title: Ridgeline
content: A landing page for ridgelinesystems.com, my self-hosted read-it-later app. Links to the repo, the docs, and the build-notes posts.

title: Glanceboard
content: About glanceboard.app, the small uptime dashboard I run for the homelab. Screenshots and a short why-I-built-it.

title: Search
content: A simple client-side search over every post. No server round-trip, just a small index built at deploy time.

title: Disclosure
content: I don't run ads or affiliate links. When I mention hardware or a service it's because I actually use it. If that ever changes I'll say so here.

title: Newsletter Archive
content: Past issues of the monthly email, in case you'd rather skim than subscribe. Same content as the blog, just bundled up.

title: Drafts
content: Private holding pen for half-finished posts: a Postgres connection-pooling writeup, an EKS migration story, and a long one about my k3s rebuild.
Nothing here. The link probably rotted or I moved a post. Try the archive or search, and sorry for the dead end.
